name: M365 Sensitivity Labels Applied
description: Ensures sensitivity labels are defined and applied for data classification
query: SELECT id, policy_type, status, last_approved_date FROM policy_documents WHERE policy_type = 'm365_sensitivity_labels' AND (status != 'approved' OR last_approved_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Define sensitivity labels and auto-labeling policies for regulated data. Review label taxonomy annually.
